notes: IFS returns the first true branch.
Direct text conditions are rejected.
IFS returns #N/A when every test is false.
Later branches are not forced after an earlier true test.
Condition errors propagate before later pairs are considered.
Exact numeric VLOOKUP baseline.
Approximate VLOOKUP defaults when range_lookup is omitted.
Exact VLOOKUP supports the current-baseline wildcard lane.
Exact VLOOKUP matches logical lookup values.
col_index_num truncates toward zero before validation.
Approximate VLOOKUP below the first key returns #N/A.
Exact VLOOKUP miss returns #N/A.
col_index_num beyond the table width returns #REF!.
col_index_num below one returns #VALUE!.
Exact numeric HLOOKUP baseline.
Approximate HLOOKUP defaults when range_lookup is omitted.
Exact HLOOKUP supports the current-baseline wildcard lane.
row_index_num truncates toward zero before validation.
Approximate HLOOKUP below the first key returns #N/A.
Exact HLOOKUP miss returns #N/A.
row_index_num beyond the table height returns #REF!.
row_index_num below one returns #VALUE!.
